---
title: "raven_proxy.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\harness\raven_proxy.py"
loc: 23
complexity: 2
logic_score: 3.97
style_score: 3.70
intel_score: 8.36
overall_score: 4.67
---

## Intent
The `raven_proxy.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on RavenProxy, __init__, send_payload. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via RavenProxy, __init__, send_payload. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 25 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
- `RavenProxy`
- `__init__`
- `send_payload`
